title: Rearrange Products Table
titleCn: 每个产品在不同商店的价格

testcases.input: Products table: +------------+--------+--------+--------+ | product_id | store1 | store2 | store3 | +------------+--------+--------+--------+ | 0 | 95 | 100 | 105 | | 1 | 70 | null | 80 | +------------+--------+--------+--------+ Output: +------------+--------+-------+ | product_id | store | price | +------------+--------+-------+ | 0 | store1 | 95 | | 0 | store2 | 100 | | 0 | store3 | 105 | | 1 | store1 | 70 | | 1 | store3 | 80 | +------------+--------+-------+ Explanation: Product 0 is available in all three stores with prices 95, 100, and 105 respectively. Product 1 is available in store1 with price 70 and store3 with price 80. The product is not available in store2.
testcases.expectedOutput: +------------+--------+-------+ | product_id | store | price | +------------+--------+-------+ | 0 | store1 | 95 | | 0 | store2 | 100 | | 0 | store3 | 105 | | 1 | store1 | 70 | | 1 | store3 | 80 | +------------+--------+-------+ Explanation: Product 0 is available in all three stores with prices 95, 100, and 105 respectively. Product 1 is available in store1 with price 70 and store3 with price 80. The product is not available in store2.
